content.text: Change the retry config defaults to 5 attempts with a 2-second base backoff.

input.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: internal/retry/config.go
@@ func Default() Config {
     return Config{
-        MaxAttempts: 3,
-        BaseBackoff: time.Second,
+        MaxAttempts: 5,
+        BaseBackoff: 2 * time.Second,
         MaxBackoff:  30 * time.Second,
         Jitter:      true,
     }
*** End Patch

content.content:
Successfully applied patch to the following files:
internal/retry/config.go
